problem.title: Implement Insertion Sort
problem.description:
Problem: Implement Insertion Sort - Implement the algorithm.

Input:
- First line: integer n
- Second line: n space-separated integers

Output:
- Print the sorted array or search result

Example:
Input:
5
64 34 25 12 22

Output:
12 22 25 34 64

solution.explanation: The program reads n and the array, then performs insertion sort by moving elements greater than the key to the right and inserting the key in its correct position. Finally it prints the sorted array.
